name: The Pauls Valley National Bank
description_short: Pauls Valley National Bank is a traditional community bank offering personal and business deposit accounts, lending products, and online banking services.
description_long:
Pauls Valley National Bank is a regional bank serving customers through traditional banking channels. Based on their website navigation and service offerings, they operate as a full-service community bank with a focus on local customers in the Pauls Valley area.

The bank provides a comprehensive range of deposit products including checking accounts, savings accounts, and certificates of deposit for both personal and business customers. They also offer individual retirement accounts (IRAs) for personal savers. On the lending side, they provide consumer loans, home mortgages, commercial loans, and construction financing. Their digital services include online banking, mobile banking, bill pay capabilities, and electronic statements.

Pauls Valley National Bank distinguishes itself through traditional community banking services such as coin machines, notary services, safe deposit boxes, night deposit facilities, and telephone banking. These offerings suggest a focus on personalized service and convenience for local customers rather than competing on digital innovation alone.

A significant limitation is that the website provided appears to be experiencing technical issues, with 404 errors on multiple pages preventing full verification of current offerings, rates, or specific account features. This makes it difficult to assess current product competitiveness or obtain detailed information about fees, minimum balances, or rate structures. Prospective customers would need to contact the bank directly or visit a physical location for complete information.
pros: Offers comprehensive deposit products including checking, savings, CDs, and IRAs
Provides both personal and business lending options including mortgages and construction loans
Multiple service channels including online banking, mobile banking, and telephone banking
Community-focused services like coin machines, safe deposit boxes, and notary services
Digital convenience features including bill pay, eStatements, and card reordering
Local branch availability with physical locations and extended service hours
Wire transfer services available for both personal and business customers
cons: Website experiencing significant technical issues with multiple 404 errors preventing access to detailed product information
No readily available information on current interest rates, fees, or account minimums from accessible web pages
Limited digital presence and no apparent details about mobile app features or online banking capabilities
Appears to be a smaller regional bank with potentially limited geographic reach compared to national competitors
No information available about deposit insurance coverage details or FDIC status from the accessible content

contact.address: 101 W Paul Ave, Pauls Valley, OK 73075

best_for: Local Pauls Valley area residents seeking traditional community banking services
Small business owners needing personalized business banking relationships
Customers who value in-person banking and physical branch services over digital-first platforms
diagnosis: Pauls Valley National Bank is best suited for local community members and small business owners who value traditional banking services and in-person relationships over digital-first platforms. The primary caveat is that the website is currently experiencing technical difficulties that prevent verification of current rates, fees, and complete product details—direct contact with the bank is necessary for accurate account information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 101 W Paul Ave, Pauls Valley, OK 73075
